title: Raw Signal Record
description: Structured input data for a single ticker entering the screening layer. All fields from all data sources are normalized into this schema before scoring begins.

ticker.description: Exchange ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, NVDA, JPM)

sector.description: Sector ETF ticker (e.g. XLK, XLF, XLE, XLV, XLI)

price_data.description: Price action and technical state. Source: TradingView.

volume_ratio.description: volume_today / volume_avg_20d. Values >1.5 indicate unusual activity.

rs_vs_sector_10d.description: % outperformance vs sector ETF over 10 days

rs_vs_sector_20d.description: % outperformance vs sector ETF over 20 days

sector_rank_pct.description: Percentile rank within sector universe (100 = top performer)

news_data.description: News velocity and sentiment. Sources: NewsAPI, RSS, Grok.

article_count_today.description: Number of articles mentioning this ticker today

article_count_7d_avg.description: 7-day rolling average of daily article count

velocity_ratio.description: article_count_today / article_count_7d_avg. Values >2.0 indicate news acceleration.

sentiment_score.description: Aggregate news sentiment. -1 = strongly negative, 0 = neutral, 1 = strongly positive.

source_quality_score.description: Quality-weighted score of sources (0 = pure social/blog, 1 = SEC/tier-1 financial press)

earnings_data.description: Earnings calendar context. Sources: SEC EDGAR, earnings APIs.

days_to_earnings.description: Calendar days until next earnings report

days_since_earnings.description: Calendar days since last earnings report

last_eps_surprise_pct.description: EPS surprise % on last report (positive = beat, negative = miss)
